allow:
Bash(printf "*1\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nPING\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---"
printf "*3\\r\\n\\$3\\r\\nSET\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nname\\r\\n\\$7\\r\\nmacache\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---"
printf "*2\\r\\n\\$3\\r\\nGET\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nname\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379 && echo "---")
Bash(printf "*1\\r\\n\\$4\\r\\nPING\\r\\n" | nc -w2 localhost 6379; sleep 1; cat /tmp/macache.log | grep -E "Decoder|Received")

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 SET name macache && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 GET name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 STRLEN name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SET counter 10 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 INCR counter && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 DECR counter && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 MSET k1 v1 k2 v2 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 MGET k1 k2 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 EXISTS name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 DEL name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 EXISTS name)
Bash(timeout 3 redis-cli -p 6379 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; grep "CMD:" /tmp/macache.log | tail -10)
Bash(timeout 3 redis-cli -p 6379 -3 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; grep "CMD:" /tmp/macache.log | tail -20)

Bash(cat > /tmp/test_interactive.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
\(
  sleep 0.5
  echo "PING"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "SET foo bar"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "GET foo"
  sleep 0.3
  echo "QUIT"
\) | redis-cli -p 6379
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/test_interactive.sh
/tmp/test_interactive.sh 2>&1)

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 RPUSH mylist a b c && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 LRANGE mylist 0 -1 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 LPUSH mylist x && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 LINDEX mylist 0 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 LPOP mylist && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 LLEN mylist)

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 SADD myset apple banana cherry && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SMEMBERS myset && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SISMEMBER myset apple && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SREM myset banana && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SCARD myset && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 SPOP myset 1)

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 HSET user name malinghan age 30 city beijing && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HGET user name && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HGETALL user && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HEXISTS user email && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HDEL user city && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HLEN user && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 HMGET user name age)

Bash(redis-cli -p 6379 ZADD leaderboard 100 alice 90 bob 95 carol && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZCARD leaderboard && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZSCORE leaderboard alice && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZRANK leaderboard bob && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZCOUNT leaderboard 90 100 && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZREM leaderboard bob && \\
redis-cli -p 6379 ZCARD leaderboard)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add v3.0 development plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git push origin master && git push origin v1.0 v2.0 2>&1)
